description: Style Note Classic five-hole lace-up shoe with clean, slim silhouetting and a refined stacked heel, by arrow for men. The strategic stitch detailing on this narrow derby shoe is a sartorial dream. The shoe is a minimalist's reinterpretation of the classic Derby. Wear this shoe crafted from Italian leather with slim Fit formal shirts and trousers.  Product Details Brown derby shoe with braided leather upper, overlays and five-hole lace up Padded tongue and inner Outsole adhered to the upper for durability Textured TPU outsole with a stacked heel Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
